privileged_info_for_vlm: The document path is /home/ga/Documents/smart_parking_rfp.odt. The 6 main headings to be styled as 'Heading 1' are: '1.0 General Information', '2.0 Scope of Work', '3.0 Schedule of Events', '4.0 Mandatory Technical Requirements', '5.0 Evaluation Criteria', and '6.0 Submission Instructions'. The deadline text to be bolded and italicized is 'October 15, 2026' (located near 'submitted no later than'). The 5 technical requirements to be placed in the Vendor Response Matrix table are: 1) The system must support real-time occupancy tracking for up to 5,000 parking spaces. 2) The system must integrate with the existing City enforcement application via REST API. 3) The vendor must provide 24/7 technical support with a 2-hour SLA. 4) The solution must be fully PCI-DSS compliant for payment processing. 5) Hardware components must operate in temperatures ranging from -20°C to 50°C.
